prompt: A serene woman in her 30s with long dark flowing hair stands gracefully in an enchanted spring forest, wearing an elegant flowing white dress that catches the warm golden-hour sunlight. Medium shot portrait composition, captured at eye level with a 50mm normal lens for natural proportions and intimate realism. Her calm, peaceful expression radiates quiet strength and ethereal beauty. Surrounding her are lush spring foliage, moss-covered trees, delicate wildflowers, and softly glowing sunbeams filtering through emerald-green and earthy brown woodland tones. Golden hour lighting creates a luminous halo effect, warm highlights, and rich atmospheric depth. Rendered in a masterful Cubist style fused with expressive impasto oil painting textures—bold geometric fragmentation, layered planes, abstracted natural forms, thick visible brushstrokes, rich palette knife texture, and dimensional paint depth. Harmonize Picasso-inspired Cubist structure with dreamlike enchanted realism, balancing abstraction and recognizable beauty. Forest green, earthy brown, ivory white, and warm amber dominate the palette. Ultra-detailed, cinematic fine art masterpiece, museum-quality digital painting, highly textured, dynamic composition, 8K resolution, vertical 4:5 portrait aspect ratio, premium digital wallpaper.
